seo.title: Courses - DeepLearning.AI
seo.metaDesc: Discover the best courses to build a career in AI | Whether you're a beginner or an experienced practitioner, our world-class curriculum and unique teaching methodology will guide you through every stage of your Al journey.
seo.opengraphDescription: Discover the best courses to build a career in AI | Whether you're a beginner or an experienced practitioner, our world-class curriculum and unique teaching methodology will guide you through every stage of your Al journey.

courseIndexPageCardFields.indexPageCardExcerpt: Learn Python programming with AI assistance. Gain skills writing, testing, and debugging code efficiently, and create real-world AI applications.
Learn the fundamentals of prompt engineering for ChatGPT. Learn effective prompting, and how to use LLMs for summarizing, inferring, transforming, and expanding.
Learn how to use generative AI's capabilities & limitations. Get an overview of real-world examples, and impact on business & society for effective strategies.
Learn foundational AI concepts through an intuitive visual approach, then learn the code needed to implement the algorithms and math for ML.

featuredCourses.title: Multi AI Agent Systems with crewAI

courseIndexPageCardFields.indexPageCardTitle: Multi AI Agent Systems with crewAI
courseIndexPageCardFields.indexPageCardExcerpt: Automate business workflows with multi-AI agent systems. Exceed the performance of prompting a single LLM by designing and prompting a team of AI agents through natural language.
Use the powerful and extensible LangChain framework, using prompts, parsing, memory, chains, question answering, and agents.
Learn about AI technologies and how to use them. Examine AI's societal impact, and learn to navigate this technological shift.
Learn how to use generative AI's capabilities & limitations. Get an overview of real-world examples, and impact on business & society for effective strategies.
Learn foundational AI concepts through an intuitive visual approach, then learn the code needed to implement the algorithms and math for ML.

topRatedCourses.title: Open Source Models with Hugging Face

courseIndexPageCardFields.indexPageCardTitle: Open Source Models with Hugging Face
courseIndexPageCardFields.indexPageCardExcerpt: Learn how to easily build AI applications using open-source models and Hugging Face tools. Find and filter open-source models on Hugging Face Hub.
Build neural networks (CNNs, RNNs, LSTMs, Transformers) and apply them to speech recognition, NLP, and more using Python and TensorFlow.
Create a chatbot with LangChain to interface with your private data and documents. Learn from LangChain creator, Harrison Chase.
Learn Python programming with AI assistance. Gain skills writing, testing, and debugging code efficiently, and create real-world AI applications.
Learn the fundamentals of prompt engineering for ChatGPT. Learn effective prompting, and how to use LLMs for summarizing, inferring, transforming, and expanding.
Learn how to use generative AI's capabilities & limitations. Get an overview of real-world examples, and impact on business & society for effective strategies.
Learn foundational AI concepts through an intuitive visual approach, then learn the code needed to implement the algorithms and math for ML.

announcementBannerCustomFields.courseName: Build and Train an LLM with JAX
Gemini CLI: Code & Create with an Open-Source Agent

hits.title: Agent Memory: Building Memory-Aware Agents
hits.description: Build a complete agent memory system that lets an LLM store, retrieve, and refine knowledge across sessions—turning a stateless agent into one that learns and improves over time.

title.value: Agent Memory: Building Memory-Aware Agents

description.value: Build a complete agent memory system that lets an LLM store, retrieve, and refine knowledge across sessions—turning a stateless agent into one that learns and improves over time.

hits.title: Build and Train an LLM with JAX
hits.description: Build and train a 20M-parameter LLM from scratch using JAX, the open-source library behind Google's Gemini, and learn the core techniques powering modern AI development.

title.value: Build and Train an LLM with JAX

description.value: Build and train a 20M-parameter LLM from scratch using JAX, the open-source library behind Google's Gemini, and learn the core techniques powering modern AI development.

hits.title: A2A: The Agent2Agent Protocol
hits.description: Connect agents across different frameworks and teams using A2A, the open protocol standardizing agent-to-agent communication.
hits.instructors: Holt Skinner, Ivan Nardini, Sandi Besen

title.value: A2A: The Agent2Agent Protocol

description.value: Connect agents across different frameworks and teams using A2A, the open protocol standardizing agent-to-agent communication.

instructors.value: Holt Skinner, Ivan Nardini, Sandi Besen

hits.title: Agent Skills with Anthropic
hits.description: Equip agents with expert on-demand knowledge to enable reliable coding, research, and data analysis workflows

title.value: Agent Skills with Anthropic

description.value: Equip agents with expert on-demand knowledge to enable reliable coding, research, and data analysis workflows

hits.title: Gemini CLI: Code & Create with an Open-Source Agent
hits.description: Build real-world applications from the command line using Gemini CLI, Google's open-source agentic coding assistant that coordinates local tools and cloud services to automate coding and creative workflows.

title.value: Gemini CLI: Code & Create with an Open-Source Agent

description.value: Build real-world applications from the command line using Gemini CLI, Google's open-source agentic coding assistant that coordinates local tools and cloud services to automate coding and creative workflows.

hits.title: Document AI: From OCR to Agentic Doc Extraction
hits.description: Build agentic systems to parse documents and extract information grounded in visual components like charts, tables, and forms.

title.value: Document AI: From OCR to Agentic Doc Extraction

description.value: Build agentic systems to parse documents and extract information grounded in visual components like charts, tables, and forms.

hits.title: Build with Andrew
hits.description: If you've never written code before, this course is for you. In less than 30 minutes, you'll learn to describe an idea in words and let AI transform it into an app for you.

title.value: Build with Andrew

description.value: If you've never written code before, this course is for you. In less than 30 minutes, you'll learn to describe an idea in words and let AI transform it into an app for you.

hits.title: Nvidia's NeMo Agent Toolkit: Making Agents Reliable
hits.description: Turn proof-of-concept agent demos into production-ready systems using observability, evaluation, and deployment tools from Nvidia's NeMo Agent Toolkit.

title.value: Nvidia's NeMo Agent Toolkit: Making Agents Reliable

description.value: Turn proof-of-concept agent demos into production-ready systems using observability, evaluation, and deployment tools from Nvidia's NeMo Agent Toolkit.

hits.title: Multi-Vector Image Retrieval
hits.description: Build advanced retrieval systems that represent images with multiple vectors, enabling fine-grained matching between text queries and visual content for accurate multi-modal search.

title.value: Multi-Vector Image Retrieval

description.value: Build advanced retrieval systems that represent images with multiple vectors, enabling fine-grained matching between text queries and visual content for accurate multi-modal search.

hits.title: Building Coding Agents with Tool Execution
hits.description: Build AI agents that write and execute code to accomplish tasks, running safely in sandboxed cloud environments that protect your systems from untrusted code.

title.value: Building Coding Agents with Tool Execution

description.value: Build AI agents that write and execute code to accomplish tasks, running safely in sandboxed cloud environments that protect your systems from untrusted code.

hits.title: Semantic Caching for AI Agents
hits.description: Speed up and reduce the costs of your AI agents by implementing semantic caching that reuses responses based on meaning rather than exact text.

title.value: Semantic Caching for AI Agents

description.value: Speed up and reduce the costs of your AI agents by implementing semantic caching that reuses responses based on meaning rather than exact text.

hits.title: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi-Agent Systems with CrewAI
hits.description: Build practical multi-agent systems that collaborate, use tools and memory, and scale reliably to production

title.value: Design, Develop, and Deploy Multi-Agent Systems with CrewAI

description.value: Build practical multi-agent systems that collaborate, use tools and memory, and scale reliably to production

hits.title: Jupyter AI: AI Coding in Notebooks
hits.description: Learn to code with AI in Jupyter notebooks. Use Jupyter AI to generate code, get explanations, and analyze data.

title.value: Jupyter AI: AI Coding in Notebooks

description.value: Learn to code with AI in Jupyter notebooks. Use Jupyter AI to generate code, get explanations, and analyze data.

hits.title: PyTorch for Deep Learning Professional Certificate
hits.description: Learn the core principles of building, optimizing, and deploying deep learning models using PyTorch.

title.value: PyTorch for Deep Learning Professional Certificate

description.value: Learn the core principles of building, optimizing, and deploying deep learning models using PyTorch.

hits.title: Fine-tuning and Reinforcement Learning for LLMs: Intro to Post-Training
hits.description: Learn how to apply fine-tuning and reinforcement learning techniques to shape model behavior, improve reasoning, and make LLMs safer and more reliable.

title.value: Fine-tuning and Reinforcement Learning for LLMs: Intro to Post-Training

description.value: Learn how to apply fine-tuning and reinforcement learning techniques to shape model behavior, improve reasoning, and make LLMs safer and more reliable.

hits.title: Governing AI Agents
hits.description: Integrate data governance into your agent's workflow to ensure it handles data safely, securely, and accurately.

title.value: Governing AI Agents

description.value: Integrate data governance into your agent's workflow to ensure it handles data safely, securely, and accurately.

hits.title: Building Live Voice Agents with Google’s ADK
hits.description: Build real-time voice AI agents, from simple to multi-agent podcast systems, using Google’s Agent Development Kit.

title.value: Building Live Voice Agents with Google’s ADK

description.value: Build real-time voice AI agents, from simple to multi-agent podcast systems, using Google’s Agent Development Kit.

hits.title: Agentic AI
hits.description: In this course taught by Andrew Ng, you'll build agentic AI systems that take action through iterative, multi-step workflows.

title.value: Agentic AI

description.value: In this course taught by Andrew Ng, you'll build agentic AI systems that take action through iterative, multi-step workflows.

hits.title: Building and Evaluating Data Agents
hits.description: Build, evaluate, and improve a multi-agent system that plans its steps, connects to data sources, and provides insights.

title.value: Building and Evaluating Data Agents

description.value: Build, evaluate, and improve a multi-agent system that plans its steps, connects to data sources, and provides insights.

hits.title: Build AI Apps with MCP Servers: Working with Box Files
hits.description: Build an LLM app that uses tools from the Box MCP server to discover Box files and extract text from them. Transform it into a multi-agent system that communicates using A2A.

title.value: Build AI Apps with MCP Servers: Working with Box Files

description.value: Build an LLM app that uses tools from the Box MCP server to discover Box files and extract text from them. Transform it into a multi-agent system that communicates using A2A.
